Author: Dasha
Name: DashaTweaks
Punchline: Quality-of-life tweaks: hotbar audit, submarine routes, craft-leve hand-ins, and glamour sync.
Description:
A growing collection of FFXIV quality-of-life tweaks, each in its own settings tab:

- Hotbar Helper: when you open Actions & Traits, scans your hotbars against your current job and shows any actions or role actions you haven't slotted anywhere — then drag an icon straight onto a hotbar slot to assign it.
- Submarines: FC submarine status at a glance, EXP-optimal route planning with one-click apply, optional unlock-progression routing, and auto-repair.
- Leves: automated craft (tradecraft) leve hand-ins — pick a leve, stand at the counter, and it accepts and turns in until your allowance floor or items run out.
- Glamour Sync: keeps a gear set's portrait matching its gear — after a glamour plate, a job change, or equipping Recommended Gear — so the "portrait doesn't match" warning stays gone.
